---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

```

```{r}
skimr::skim(Annual_school_closures_and_standardized_test_scores_in_California_2003_2019)
```

```{r}
df |>
  mutate(
    cause_sum = rowSums(
      pick(days_wildfire, days_natural_disasters_weather, days_infrastructure,
           days_student_safety, days_other),
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    diff = days_total - cause_sum
  ) |>
  count(diff, sort = TRUE)
```
